form.formComment: Second run back. Comes off a 57-day let-up. First-up after two months 11th of 13 at Riyadh Dirt in the SAUG2 SAUG2 RIYADH DIRT SPRINT on February 14 over 1200m, 17 len behind Imagination with 57kg at $21. Previously second-up 7th of 12 at Sha Tin All Weather Rating 80 on October 23 2024 over 1200m, 6 len behind Capital Delight with 56.5kg at $11. Looks a fair way off peak form so others are preferred.

Hard to go past based on recent performances.
